scripts.test: npm run build:plugins && node --test packages/polycli-utils/test/*.test.js packages/polycli-timing/test/*.test.js packages/polycli-runtime/test/*.test.js plugins/polycli/scripts/tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.pack:codex: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./plugins/polycli-codex/.codex-plugin/plugin.json').version") && mkdir -p dist && tar -czf dist/polycli-codex-$VERSION.tgz -C plugins polycli-codex
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run validate:manifests && npm run validate:host-map && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && claude plugin validate plugins/polycli/.claude-plugin/plugin.json && { check_publishable() { pkg_dir="$1"; pkg_spec=$(node -e "const p = require(process.argv[1] + '/package.json'); process.stdout.write(p.name + '@' + p.version);" "$pkg_dir"); if npm view "$pkg_spec" version >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm pack "$pkg_dir" --dry-run >/dev/null; else npm publish "$pkg_dir" --dry-run --access public; fi; }; check_publishable ./plugins/polycli-opencode && check_publishable ./packages/polycli-utils && check_publishable ./packages/polycli-timing; }
